title: WV10 7DB, Aqua Force Special Waste Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/XP3992FV/V011
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Aqua Force Special Waste Limited   Installation name: Aqua Force Special Waste   Permit number: EPR/XP3992FV/V011   "
